title: Lead with Impact - Program Feedback Survey
description: Thank you for participating in the Lead with Impact program! Your feedback helps us continuously improve the experience for future leaders. This survey takes approximately 5-7 minutes to complete.

questions.sectionDescription: Please rate your experience with the onboarding process (forms, DISC assessment, and coaching call).

questions.title: How satisfied were you with the overall onboarding experience?
The onboarding coaching call helped clarify my goals and expectations for the program.
What could we improve about the onboarding process?

questions.sectionDescription: Please share your feedback on the intensive 3-day boot camp experience.

questions.title: How satisfied were you with the 3-day Leadership Boot Camp?
The instructors were knowledgeable and engaging.
The content was relevant to my leadership role and challenges.
What was the most valuable takeaway from the boot camp?

questions.sectionDescription: Please rate your experience with the ongoing Leadership Labs.

questions.title: The Leadership Labs met my expectations for ongoing development.
I have been able to apply what I learned in the Labs to my actual work.

questions.sectionDescription: Final questions about your complete Lead with Impact journey.

questions.title: How likely are you to recommend Lead with Impact to a colleague or friend?
What has been the biggest impact of this program on your leadership?

questions.sectionDescription: Please share any other feedback, suggestions, or comments you'd like us to know.
